title: Sochi, Krasnodar Krai — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sochi, Krasnodar Krai: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sochi is a city in Krasnodar Krai with a population of 445,000. Russia’s premier Black Sea resort, host of the 2014 Winter Olympics, with a subtropical climate, beautiful beaches, and mountain ski resorts.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
